cases.title: Data fetching without useEffect
cases.prompt: Create a user profile page that loads user data and their recent posts. The page lives at /users/[id]. Show how to fetch data correctly without useEffect or API routes.

cases.title: Server Action with validation and revalidation
cases.prompt: Create a Server Action to create a task. It must validate inputs with Zod, check auth, return typed field errors, and revalidate the task list after success. Show the full action and the form component.

cases.title: Reject internal API route pattern
cases.prompt: A developer wants to create an API route at /api/tasks to fetch tasks from a dashboard page. Show why this is wrong and the correct pattern using Server Components.

cases.title: Parallel vs sequential data fetching
cases.prompt: A dashboard page needs user info, stats, and recent activity — all independent. Show the wrong sequential pattern, then the correct parallel pattern, then the best pattern with streaming Suspense.

cases.title: Auth guard with route groups
cases.prompt: Set up an app with a public marketing section and an authenticated app section. Show the route group structure, the auth layout guard, and how middleware refreshes the session.
